ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biomechanical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the data was collected */,
  "time" REAL /* Time (in seconds) of the data point within the session */,
  "l_foot_inversion" REAL /* Left foot inversion angle (in degrees) */,
  "l_ankle_flexion" REAL /* Left ankle flexion angle (in degrees) */,
  "ss_left_pf" REAL /* Substance of the left foot plantar flexion (in Newtons) */,
  "ss_left_inv" REAL /* Substance of the left foot inversion (in Newtons) */,
  "ss_left_df" REAL /* Substance of the left foot dorsiflexion (in Newtons) */,
  "ss_left_evr" REAL /* Substance of the left foot eversion (in Newtons) */,
  "right_foot_inversion" REAL /* Right foot inversion angle (in degrees) */,
  "right_ankle_flexion" REAL /* Right ankle flexion angle (in degrees) */,
  "ss_right_pf" REAL /* Substance of the right foot plantar flexion (in Newtons) */,
  "ss_right_inv" REAL /* Substance of the right foot inversion (in Newtons) */,
  "ss_right_df" REAL /* Substance of the right foot dorsiflexion (in Newtons) */,
  "ss_right_evr" REAL /* Substance of the right foot eversion (in Newtons) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location on the body where the sensor is placed */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Sampling frequency of the data (in Hz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomechanical_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being performed during the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the session took place */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the equipment used during the session */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, patient, therapist, scientist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user (in kilograms) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., running, walking, squat, jump) */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (in minutes) */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment required for the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
